# VoiceInsert

> VoiceInsert is a macOS menu bar app for hold-to-talk dictation: hold a global shortcut, speak, release—text goes into the focused text field or into an Obsidian vault as Markdown. Speech recognition uses Apple’s on-device stack (Microphone + Speech Recognition permissions). macOS 13+.

## Site

- Home: /
- FAQ (macOS dictation, Obsidian, permissions, privacy): /faq

## Source

- Open source (MIT), GitHub releases distribute VoiceInsert-macos.zip.

## Do not

- Crawl /gate, /api/, /success (utility or non-content URLs).
